name: Fast 404
description: Speed up the generation of 404 pages with this module. Route 404 display to a static page.

suggests.drupal/redirect: Dev dependency; when installed, set $settings['fast404_respect_redirect'] = TRUE so path-checking honours redirects.

configuration_model: settings.php only. All behaviour is controlled by $settings['fast404_*'] keys read via Settings::get() (see example.settings.fast404.php). There is no admin UI, no config entity, no *.routing.yml, no config schema, and no permissions. Enabling the module gives static-file extension checking with defaults; everything else is opt-in through settings.php.
